headline: Sarawak Builds RM580 Million Hospital Without Federal Aid
context: Sarawak completed RM580 million Samarahan Specialist Hospital in December 2025 entirely state-funded without Health Ministry involvement.

cards.big: Sarawak built RM580 million specialist hospital without federal funding
cards.sub: Samarahan facility is first fully state-funded hospital in Malaysian history

cards.big: Hospital has 450 beds and 12 specialist departments serving 200,000 people
cards.sub: Reduces patient transfers to Kuching General Hospital by estimated 40%

cards.big: State funded construction from petroleum royalty reserves accumulated since 2020
cards.sub: Move signals Sarawak intent to build parallel healthcare independently

cards.big: Federal Health Ministry normally funds all public hospitals nationally
cards.sub: Ministry officials expressed concern about precedent of states bypassing coordination

cards.big: State hospital tests whether parallel infrastructure strengthens or fragments healthcare
RM580 million hospital built without federal aid. Sarawak is funding its own healthcare infrastructure.
